input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.9.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.9.2
            TITLE: if the material of the housing containing parts of the tractive system is electrically conductive,

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.9.2: If the material of the housing containing parts of the Tractive System is electrically conductive,
EV.4.9.2 If the material of the housing containing parts of the Tractive System is electrically conductive, 
it must have a low resistance connection to GLV System Ground, see EV.6.7

final_answer: rule EV.4.9.2: If the material of the housing containing parts of the Tractive System is electrically conductive, it must have a low resistance connection to GLV System Ground, see EV.6.7
